AI 市场综述 ▼ 收起
【今日看点】 今天市场整体是个“科技股带头冲，避险情绪降温”的行情。最亮眼的是纳斯达克涨了1.38%，白银更是飙涨超5%。恐慌指数VIX大跌13%，说明大家没那么害怕了。不过，原油价格暴跌超6%，成了全场最惨的仔。整体看，除了能源，其他主要资产都在涨，市场情绪偏乐观。 【三件大事】 1. 地缘政治：特朗普放话要压油价。 美国总统特朗普接连宣布，为了降低油价，将暂时豁免部分石油制裁，并暗示伊朗核威胁结束后油价会“迅速下降”。这直接给市场一个强烈的信号：美国要主动增加原油供应来打压价格。关键数据是WTI原油应声大跌6.46%。 2. 突发事件：伊朗权力交接世袭化。 伊朗官方宣布，已故最高领袖哈梅内伊的儿子莫杰塔巴当选为新任最高领袖。这是伊朗1979年革命推翻君主制后，首次出现权力世袭，可能加剧内部及地区局势的不确定性。此事重要性满分，是中东地缘格局的重大变量。 3. 市场情绪：恐慌指数大幅回落。 被称为“恐慌指数”的VIX今天暴跌了13.53%，收在25.50。这个跌幅非常明显，通常意味着投资者对短期市场波动的担忧在快速减轻，风险偏好回升。这与股市普涨、避险黄金涨幅温和（+1.39%）的表现相互印证。 【影响分析】 特朗普打压油价的言论立竿见影，直接重创了原油价格，并可能压制未来一段时间的能源板块。伊朗权力世袭这个突发事件，长期看可能让中东局势更复杂，但短期市场似乎更关注美国增加供应带来的通缩预期。VIX恐慌指数大跌，直接反映了市场情绪的转向，从之前的谨慎甚至恐惧，变为更愿意承担风险，这为股市尤其是对利率敏感的科技股（纳斯达克大涨）提供了上涨氛围。整体看，市场情绪正从“恐惧”向“贪婪”过渡。 【接下来怎么看】 未来几天，市场估计会继续消化美国压油价的政策预期，原油价格可能承压，同时关注伊朗方面的反应。股市的关键看纳斯达克能否站稳22700点上方，道指和标普的阻力位分别在47800点和6800点附近。需要盯紧的风险有两个：一是地缘局势（尤其是伊朗）会不会有意外升级，二是如果油价持续大跌，会不会引发对全球经济增长的担忧，从而改变市场乐观情绪。

新闻简报 13 个主题 按主题聚合 ▼ 收起
系统性/市场结构风险 4 条
▼
美国法院驳回预测市场公司关于联邦监管优先的论点，意味着相关创新金融产品在州层面将面临更严格的博彩法审查与法律不确定性，这直接抑制了该类市场的扩张潜力与投资者参与热度。与此同时，韩国股市出现超过8%的暴跌并触发熔断机制，盘中跌幅一度扩大至11%，这明确揭示了局部市场已出现严重的流动性危机与恐慌性抛售，属于典型的市场结构风险事件。两件事虽处不同领域，但共同指向当前金融环境中监管收紧与市场脆弱性并存的压力。
判断为利空。（监管不确定性上升与关键市场出现剧烈动荡共同压制风险偏好。）

FOMC/美联储 18 条
▼
--- 当前市场面临的核心矛盾在于，地缘政治风险与顽固的通胀压力正形成共振，强化了美联储的鹰派立场。霍尔木兹海峡原油运输中断与油价上涨，已被美联储官员视为潜在加剧通胀的威胁，[[6]](https://finance.yahoo.com/news/fed-hammack-warns-potential-tighter-022142748.html)与鲍威尔近期表态相互印证，表明能源价格已成为货币政策的关键扰动项。[[7]](https://www.thestreet.com/fed/oil-inflation-threaten-fed-interest-rate-cuts-under-warsh)与此同时，美联储近期密集的监管与执法行动，显示出其在金融稳定与风险防范上的前置性布局，为应对潜在的市场波动做准备。综合来看，地缘冲突推高能源成本，直接巩固了美联储维持紧缩以对抗通胀的政策路径，市场对利率将在更长时间内维持高位的预期将得到强化，这对风险资产构成压力。经过交叉验证
判断为利空。（地缘风险推高通胀预期，强化美联储鹰派立场，不利风险偏好。） ---

债券市场（国债/信用债） 7 条
▼
美国财政部即将进行的1830亿美元国债拍卖，将显著增加中短期国债的市场供给，对国债市场构成直接压力。与此同时，日本公共养老基金在国内债券收益率上升时减持本国债券，这一行为反映了全球范围内利率上行环境下，大型机构对固收资产的配置调整，可能加剧债券市场的抛售情绪。另一方面，美国能源部向企业提供巨额贷款以及美印签署长期铀供应协议，均显示出政府对特定战略产业的大力支持，这可能在一定程度上分流原本可能进入国债市场的资金，或提升市场对经济增长与通胀的预期，从而对债券价格形成压制。综合来看，市场面临供给增加与需求结构性转移的双重考验。
判断为利空。（国债供给压力叠加机构配置调整，构成明确利空因素。）

风险偏好与波动 18 条
▼
当前市场正被地缘政治风险与金融体系脆弱性双重夹击。美国和以色列对伊朗的军事行动直接触发了风险资产的剧烈波动，韩国股市因内存市场崩溃而暴跌，VIX恐慌指数飙升至去年11月以来高位，均印证了市场恐慌情绪的蔓延。然而，关键转折点在于特朗普总统关于伊朗战争的言论后，标普500指数出现飙升，结合迈克尔·伯里的评论，这强烈暗示市场正将政策制定者的言论视为潜在的“救市”信号，从而在恐慌中寻求支撑。与此同时，传统避险资产呈现复杂图景：黄金虽短期回调但投资需求强劲，Solana上的代币化黄金交易量创纪录激增，原油期货动量指标升至36年高位，显示资金正以极高效率涌入各类避险或通胀对冲工具。这并非单纯的经济厄运，而是市场在极端不确定性下，对政策干预预期与硬资产价值进行重新定价的过程。劳埃德·布兰克费恩关于市场对风险“更加自满”的警告，在此刻显得尤为刺耳。
综合判断：利空。（地缘冲突直接冲击风险偏好，恐慌指数飙升与股市暴跌显示市场正对系统性风险进行定价，尽管存在政策言论引发的技术性反弹，但基本趋势已转向避险。）

突发事件与监管 11 条
▼
市场信息显示，地缘政治与科技监管正成为主导近期风险偏好的关键变量。特朗普政府关于对古巴进行“友好接管”的讨论，以及其本人声称的古巴政府正在进行的谈判，显著增加了地缘局势的复杂性，可能扰动相关区域的市场情绪。与此同时，美国政府准备限制未经批准的全球AI芯片出货，结合英伟达已将网络产品打造为主要增长驱动力的事实，预示着全球半导体供应链，特别是高端AI芯片的贸易流动可能面临更严格的审查与约束，这将对相关科技企业的国际市场拓展构成潜在压力。另一方面，黑石集团筹备上市数据中心收购工具，以及生成式AI在招聘系统中的渗透，反映了AI基础设施与应用需求的结构性增长趋势依然坚实。中国商务部暂停对美出口镓、锗等关键矿产的禁令，则暂时缓解了供应链上的一个紧张环节。
综合判断：中性偏谨慎。（地缘不确定性叠加科技监管收紧，对冲了部分产业增长动能。）

通胀/就业/GDP（CPI/PCE/NFP/PMI） 58 条
▼
当前市场正面临地缘政治风险与通胀数据间的激烈博弈。一方面，霍尔木兹海峡关闭导致油价隔夜暴涨至116美元，若此高油价持续，将直接推动美国CPI通胀率升至3.5%以上，并可能拖累GDP增长。另一方面，最新公布的2月非农就业人数意外减少9.2万，失业率升至4.4%，显示劳动力市场出现疲软迹象。这两股力量共同指向滞胀风险加剧：PPI环比飙升0.5%表明上游通胀压力顽固，而零售销售下滑与就业数据走弱则揭示了经济动能的隐忧。在此背景下，美联储政策路径陷入两难，市场对即将公布的CPI、PCE及GDP数据高度敏感，黄金价格在美元走强与滞胀担忧的拉扯中震荡。
判断为利空。（地缘冲突推高油价与顽固通胀数据，叠加就业市场意外疲软，共同加剧了经济滞胀风险。）

地缘与能源 271 条
▼
当前市场正经历由地缘政治冲突直接驱动的剧烈波动。美国与以色列对伊朗的协同军事打击，以及特朗普政府“有时必须使用武力”的强硬表态，已导致油价单日飙升。尽管美国为缓解油价压力，宣布豁免部分石油制裁并可能进一步解除对俄油制裁，但这些供给侧的调节措施在军事行动的即时冲击面前显得滞后且力度不足。伊朗同意放弃浓缩铀库存的消息虽具长期缓和潜力，但美国持续通过制裁、武装反对派及军事打击施压，表明紧张局势在短期内难以根本解除。市场恐慌情绪已主导交易逻辑，任何军事升级或针对全球石油供应的威胁言论都将直接转化为油价上行动力。
综合判断：利多。（地缘军事冲突的即时风险溢价已压倒供给调节措施，主导油价短期强势。）

关键人物表态 2 条
▼
美国总统特朗普关于伊朗核计划的表态，增加了地缘政治不确定性，可能对全球能源市场构成潜在扰动。与此同时，白宫与科技巨头的会面及后者关于电费的承诺，直接指向一个核心矛盾：数据中心电力需求正经历爆发式增长。国际能源署的报告已证实，美国数据中心用电量自2017年起激增近两倍，并预测未来五年将再翻一番。这一趋势将结构性推高电力需求，但科技公司的承诺旨在缓解其对居民电价的直接影响。因此，市场焦点将转向电力基础设施的升级压力与相关投资机会，电力板块及上游设备供应商将直接受益于确定性的资本开支增长。
判断为利多。（数据中心电力需求激增的确定性趋势，将驱动电力基础设施领域的投资。）
[@zerohedge] *TRUMP: IRAN TOLD US IT WAN… Visualizing Data Center Power Surge Befo…
▶ 原始来源（2 条）
大宗商品（石油/铜/农产品） 19 条
▼
当前石油市场的核心矛盾在于地缘政治风险溢价与供应端稳定预期的激烈博弈。特朗普总统关于战争可能很快结束、希望保持石油流向世界的言论，以及美国政府计划为油轮提供保险和军事保护以控制能源价格的举措，都在直接削弱市场对供应长期中断的恐慌。这导致油价从高位大幅逆转，期货价格倒挂也反映出市场对近端供应紧张的担忧正在被这些政策对冲。然而，冲突进入第三天且双方誓言升级，以及针对关键基础设施的叛乱袭击，意味着地缘风险并未根除，为油价提供底部支撑。综合来看，美国政府一系列旨在“显著更加安全”和稳定价格的政策信号强度，暂时压过了冲突本身带来的不确定性，市场情绪正从恐慌性抢购转向对供应恢复的预期。
综合判断：利空。（政策干预强力对冲地缘风险，驱动风险溢价回落。）

▶ 原始来源（19 条）
宏观经济综合 19 条
▼
当前市场呈现出风险偏好与避险情绪交织的复杂图景。一方面，散户投资者持续26个月净买入股票，且二月购买力度为历史第五强，显示市场参与热情高涨；民主党中期选举胜率升至新高，可能带来政策延续性预期，叠加加州考虑为先进核能解禁等结构性变革，为特定领域提供了长期叙事。另一方面，地缘冲突升级已引发纳斯达克100指数期货显著下跌，私人信贷领域接连暴露出抵押品重复质押等严重问题，且投资级科技债利差自金融危机以来首次走阔至平均水平之上，均指向信用风险与流动性压力正在累积。比特币价格虽因特定地缘事件预期而回升，但市场同时给出投资者在较高价位充足的卖出时间窗口，这暗示其上涨动能可能并不稳固。综合来看，市场在表层流动性支撑下维持热度，但深层信用结构与地缘风险正在酝酿实质性压力，高估值资产尤为脆弱。
判断为利空。（表层流动性难掩深层信用与地缘风险压力。）

▶ 原始来源（19 条）
美国政治与财政/贸易 53 条
▼
当前市场核心矛盾在于美国贸易政策的高度不确定性与全球供应链的适应性调整。美国最高法院裁定总统无权以紧急权力实施全面关税，削弱了特朗普政府单边行动的合法性基础，但特朗普仍持续威胁对多国加征高额关税，并已实际促使部分制造业回流。这种政策反复与法律挑战并存的局面，导致东南亚出口商调整战略，并引发日本股市因关税担忧而暴跌。与此同时，中国正通过优化财政支出、制定新金融法规来强化内部经济韧性，并计划与美国举行新一轮贸易会谈，显示出在外部压力下寻求平衡的姿态。全球贸易流动受阻与成本上升的风险正在累积，企业投资决策将趋于谨慎。
综合判断：利空。（贸易政策不确定性持续压制全球风险偏好与供应链效率。）

▶ 原始来源（53 条）
贵金属（黄金/白银/铂金） 56 条
▼
当前贵金属市场呈现出典型的多空因素交织格局，但结构性利多因素更为坚实。一方面，美元走强与美债收益率上升对金价构成短期压力，导致价格出现剧烈波动甚至单日暴跌。另一方面，市场的核心驱动力正在发生深刻转变：全球央行虽阶段性需求放缓，但私人投资者正以盎司为单位增持并复利财富，这构成了新的、可持续的买盘基础。同时，关键品种的供应面持续紧张，白银已进入连续第八年短缺且库存见底，铂金市场亦预计出现连续第四年供应赤字，这从基本面封杀了价格深度下跌的空间。地缘政治风险（如中东冲突）与经济不确定性（如不及预期的美国就业数据）交替为市场提供避险支撑，而多家权威机构如美国银行、MKS PAMP均指出金价牛市处于中期，仍有明确的上行路径。尽管市场会对短期消息（如地缘事件）进行“买预期，卖事实”的交易，但硬资产在债务上升与政策不确定性背景下的配置价值正在系统性提升。
综合判断：利多。结构性供应短缺、私人财富配置转向以及宏观不确定性，共同构筑了贵金属价格中长期上行的坚实基底。

▼
全球核电领域正迎来多重关键信号。美国敦促重启现有核电站，中国则计划启动能处理核废料的先进ADS反应堆，这共同指向一个趋势：在电力需求持续增长（中国2024-2025年用电量增长5%）而传统煤电（同期下降113TWh）面临转型压力的背景下，主要经济体正将核能视为保障能源安全与实现低碳目标的重要支柱。与此同时，以色列对伊朗核设施的打击凸显了地缘政治风险，可能加剧市场对核能供应链安全的关注。更长远地看，全球核聚变竞赛加速，预示着未来能源格局可能迎来颠覆性变革。这些事实表明，核电产业不仅面临现实的扩容与升级需求，更承载着未来的能源愿景。
判断为利多。（主要经济体政策支持与技术突破共同强化核电产业长期发展逻辑。）

AI 深度解读
美国总统特朗普宣布，为降低油价，将暂时豁免部分与石油相关的制裁措施。该政策属于临时性调整，旨在通过增加市场供应来平抑价格，直至市场状况恢复正常。此举直接针对能源领域，可能立即影响全球原油供需格局与价格预期。
President Trump announced the temporary waiver of certain oil-related sanctions to cut prices. This is a provisional measure aimed at increasing market supply to lower prices until the situation stabilizes. The policy directly targets the energy sector and is likely to have an immediate impact on global crude oil supply-demand dynamics and price expectations.

地缘与能源The Oil Island That Could Break Iran
可能击垮伊朗的石油之岛
ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-03-09 08:55
AI 深度解读
据ZeroHedge报道，美国总统特朗普可能考虑通过夺取伊朗的哈尔克岛（Kharg Island）来加大对伊朗政权的压力。该岛是伊朗最重要的石油设施所在地，其波斯湾出口终端处理该国高达90%的原油出口，是伊朗经济及伊朗革命卫队的关键收入来源。前五角大楼高级顾问迈克尔·鲁宾指出，夺取该岛将切断伊朗政权控制民众的关键资金来源。
According to ZeroHedge, President Donald Trump may consider intensifying pressure on Iran by seizing Kharg Island, Iran's most important oil facility. This Persian Gulf export terminal handles up to 90% of the nation's crude oil, serving as a cornerstone of Iran's economy and a major revenue source for the Iranian Revolutionary Guard. Michael Rubin, a former senior Pentagon adviser, stated that seizing the island would deprive the regime of a key funding source for controlling the population.

President Trump stated that oil prices "will drop rapidly" when the "Iran nuclear threat is over," adding it is "a very small price to pay." This implies a potential policy shift towards easing sanctions on Iran or reaching a new nuclear deal, which would increase global oil supply. The key source is Trump himself, with no specific timeline or deal details provided.

地缘与能源Iran Picks Khamenei's Son As Next Supreme Leader
伊朗选定哈梅内伊之子为下一任最高领袖
ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-03-09 03:55
AI 深度解读
伊朗半官方法尔斯通讯社宣布，最高领袖阿里·哈梅内伊之子莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊（56岁）当选为伊朗下一任最高领袖。这是在哈梅内伊遇袭身亡后，伊朗专家会议通过“决定性投票”作出的决定。这是自1979年革命推翻巴列维王朝以来，伊朗首次出现世袭继任，距推翻君主制已47年。莫杰塔巴生于1969年，曾参加两伊战争，后成为教士。
Iran's semi-official Fars news agency announced that Mojtaba Khamenei (56), son of Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, has been elected as Iran's next supreme leader following his father's death. The Assembly of Experts conducted a "decisive vote" hours before the public announcement. This marks the first hereditary succession since the 1979 revolution overthrew the Pahlavi monarchy 47 years ago. Mojtaba, born in 1969, fought in the Iran-Iraq war and later became a cleric.

ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-03-07 06:20
AI 深度解读
ZeroHedge平台于新闻发布前夜举办了一场关于伊朗战争的辩论，由《美国保守派》杂志执行主任Curt Mills和东北大学教授Max Abrahms参与。辩论核心围绕美国特朗普政府的中东政策展开，特别是其与以色列的复杂关系。Abrahms教授指出，认为以色列完全主导美国政策的观点忽略了华盛顿多次违背以色列意愿的案例，例如特朗普任命在以色列备受争议的Tom Barrack为驻土耳其大使，以及解除对叙利亚制裁等政策。
ZeroHedge hosted a debate on the Iran war the night before this report, featuring Curt Mills, executive director of The American Conservative, and Max Abrahms, a professor at Northeastern University. The discussion centered on the Trump administration's Middle East policy, particularly its complex relationship with Israel. Professor Abrahms argued that the view of Israel dictating U.S. policy overlooks instances where Washington acted against Israeli preferences, citing examples like the appointment of the controversial Tom Barrack as ambassador to Turkey and policies such as lifting sanctions on Syria.

Sources including CNN report that the CIA is working to arm Kurdish forces to spark an uprising and foment government collapse in Iran. In retaliation, a suspected Iranian drone attack hit the CIA's station in Saudi Arabia and reportedly a consulate in Dubai. IAEA Director General Grossi stated there is no evidence Iran is building a nuclear bomb, though Iran maintains a large stockpile of near-weapons-grade enriched uranium. The U.S. State Department is securing military aircraft and charter flights to evacuate Americans from the Middle East.

On Monday, President Donald Trump, via modernity.news, delivered a clear message to critics within conservative media. He dismissed pushback from commentators Tucker Carlson and Megyn Kelly regarding his Iran policy as being out of step with 'America First' priorities. Trump asserted that 'true' MAGA supporters back his efforts to neutralize the Iranian threat and prevent nuclear proliferation, emphasizing that securing the homeland against regimes like Iran is non-negotiable, regardless of noise from sidelined commentators.

During a White House meeting with German Chancellor Friedrich Merz on Tuesday, US President Donald Trump criticized European allies, praised China, was ambiguous on tariffs, and justified his order to attack Iran while negotiations were ongoing, claiming it prevented a nuclear war. The meeting was attended by Vice-President J.D. Vance and Secretary of State Marco Rubio.

2月28日，美国导弹袭击摧毁了伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队总部，打破了持续十多年的核僵局。随着最高领袖阿里·哈梅内伊的死亡被确认，冲突焦点已转移。新闻指出，哈梅内伊多年构建的“抵抗经济”不仅关乎石油，更是旨在融入一个能抵御西方压力的资源轴心，而中国是其背后的关键伙伴。
The U.S. missile strikes on February 28th that leveled the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps headquarters ended over a decade of nuclear stalemate. Following the confirmation of Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei's death, the conflict's focus shifted. The report highlights that Khamenei's "Resistance Economy" was not just about oil but a strategic integration into a resource axis to withstand Western pressure, with China as the silent partner.

系统性/市场结构风险Kalshi, Polymarket Face Trading Halt In Nevada After Court Rulings
法院裁决后，Kalshi和Polymarket在内华达州面临交易暂停
ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-03-04 03:25
AI 深度解读
根据周一（新闻发布日期）的法院命令，美国联邦法官在两项独立裁决中驳回了预测市场公司关于《商品交易法》（CEA）和商品期货交易委员会（CFTC）监管完全优先于州博彩法的论点。法官认为CEA的保留条款并未完全取代州权力，并将涉及Polymarket母公司Blockratize和Kalshi的争议发回州法院审理。这意味着内华达州博彩控制委员会可以继续在州法院推进其民事执法案件，并可能寻求禁令限制该州居民访问事件合约。
According to a Monday court order, a U.S. federal judge, in two separate rulings, rejected arguments that regulation under the Commodity Exchange Act (CEA) and the CFTC fully preempts state gaming laws for prediction markets. The judge found the CEA's savings clause does not completely displace state authority and sent disputes involving Polymarket's parent Blockratize and Kalshi back to state court. This allows the Nevada Gaming Control Board to continue its civil enforcement case and potentially seek an injunction restricting Nevada residents' access to event contracts.
相关标的 比特币/BTC
利空 对预测市场平台Polymarket和Kalshi及其相关生态利空：监管风险加剧，业务在关键司法管辖区面临被限制的风险。

US Treasury-财政部新闻 2026-02-28 17:09
AI 深度解读
美国财政部发布新闻，宣布更新其海外资产控制办公室（OFAC）的制裁名单。该新闻的核心是提醒公众和金融机构可以搜索OFAC的制裁名单，以遵守美国制裁法规。这属于常规的行政公告，不涉及新的制裁措施、具体实体、金额或时间节点。其影响在于强化现有制裁框架的执行与合规要求。
The U.S. Department of the Treasury issued a news release announcing an update to the Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) sanctions lists. The core of the news is to remind the public and financial institutions that they can search OFAC's sanctions lists to comply with U.S. sanctions regulations. This is a routine administrative announcement, not involving new sanctions measures, specific entities, amounts, or timelines. Its impact lies in reinforcing the enforcement and compliance requirements of the existing sanctions framework.

As a tool of U.S. foreign policy and national security, sanctions directly impact global supply chains, trade in specific commodities, and the investment and financing activities of associated enterprises, potentially triggering market risk aversion or volatility in specific asset prices.

On October 3, 2024, the U.S. Department of the Treasury sanctioned an entity called 'Exploit Broker' and two of its key members. The network is accused of stealing and selling sensitive U.S. government cyber tools that could be used in cyberattacks. This action is part of the U.S. government's efforts to combat cybercrime and protect critical infrastructure and national security assets by disrupting the financial and tool supply chains of illicit cyber activities.

The article examines whether China will assist Iran amid escalating tensions with the US-Israeli alliance. While China is unlikely to provide direct military intervention, its support is substantive and multifaceted. At the UN Security Council, China has consistently used its veto power as a principled tool. Last month, Chinese Ambassador Sun Lei explicitly opposed the use of force in an emergency meeting, demonstrating China's strategic support, which operates on a different wavelength than traditional military alliances.

On February 27, 2026, Vice President JD Vance, speaking to The Washington Post aboard Air Force Two, asserted there is "no chance" that U.S. military strikes on Iran would result in a prolonged American war. He made these comments while explaining that the Trump administration is weighing options to prevent Iran from obtaining a nuclear weapon, and sought to defend prior campaign promises decrying regime change wars. This follows social media discussions highlighting unusual activity at Israel's Ben Gurion Airport, pointing to heightened regional tensions.

US Treasury Secretary Scott Bennett announced a 30-day waiver for Indian refiners to purchase Russian oil already stranded at sea, provided it yields "no significant financial benefit to the Russian government." The stated aim is to maintain global oil flow amid disruptions from the Third Gulf War in the Strait of Hormuz. Senior leadership of New York City's Department of Sanitation (DSNY) was recorded participating in an Islamic supplication ritual (dua) led by Mayor Zohran Mamdani during a gathering with officers. The ritual involved raising hands in prayer to Allah and wiping them over their faces as per Islamic hadith. Critics have denounced the act as a blatant push toward Islamification. The report originated from Steve Watson via Modernity.news and was featured by ZeroHedge.

On Saturday, April 19, the same day the US and Israel launched air strikes against Iran, a research team led by Liao Longwen from the Northwest Institute of Nuclear Technology published a paper in the Chinese journal Tactical Missile Technology. The paper concluded that existing US missile defence systems are dangerously outmatched and theoretically inadequate against hypersonic weapons. The timing highlights China's strategic foresight.

风险偏好与波动[@RayDalio] Playing the markets is like riding a roller coaster; most people are comfortable and want more when they steadily go up and get scared when there are the inevitable plunges down, yet it is not logical…
玩转市场就像坐过山车；大多数人稳步上升时感到舒适并想要更多，而在不可避免的暴跌时感到恐惧，但这并不合理…
Twitter/X - 关键人物推文（官方API） 2026-03-04 01:09
AI 深度解读
桥水基金创始人瑞·达利欧通过社交媒体发表对市场行为的评论，核心观点是：市场波动如同过山车，投资者常在上涨时贪婪、下跌时恐惧，这种情绪化反应有害。他建议投资者应制定并严格遵守一套经过压力测试、符合自身风险承受能力的投资策略，以更从容地应对市场波动，实现更优的风险调整后收益。
Ray Dalio, founder of Bridgewater Associates, commented on market behavior via social media, comparing it to a roller coaster. He noted that investors often become greedy during uptrends and fearful during downturns, which is detrimental. His key advice is for investors to develop and strictly adhere to a well-tested, personalized investment plan that aligns with their risk tolerance. This disciplined approach aims to navigate market volatility more comfortably and achieve better risk-adjusted returns.

ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-02-28 04:00
AI 深度解读
美国能源部（DOE）于2025年11月18日宣布，其能源主导融资办公室（EDF）已向南方公司（Southern Co.）的两家子公司——佐治亚电力（Georgia Power）和阿拉巴马电力（Alabama Power）——提供了总额高达265.4亿美元的历史性贷款。这笔为期约30年、可支取至2033年9月的贷款，将用于支持超过16.7吉瓦的发电与输电升级项目，包括新建天然气发电、核电站升级（含沃格特勒核电站）以及水电现代化等。
On November 18, 2025, the U.S. Department of Energy (DOE) announced that its Office of Energy Dominance Financing (EDF) has closed a historic $26.54 billion loan package to Southern Company subsidiaries Georgia Power ($22.4 billion) and Alabama Power ($4.1 billion). The roughly 30-year loans, drawable through September 2033, will finance over 16.7 GW of generation and transmission upgrades, including new natural-gas capacity, nuclear improvements (e.g., at Vogtle), and hydropower modernization.

President Donald Trump told a Republican conference and in interviews with CBS and NBC that the U.S. 'short-term excursion' in Iran is nearly complete. He warned that Iran would be hit harder if it resumes hostilities or targets global oil supplies. Trump refused to comment on whether the new Supreme Leader is a target and said seizing Iran's oil is 'too soon' but not ruled out. Oil prices dropped on the headline.

ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警, Twitter/X - 关键人物推文（官方API） (2 sources) 2026-03-09 09:45
AI 深度解读
美国总统特朗普于周日（具体日期未明确）在X平台发文，称飙升的油价是为世界和平付出的“小代价”，并预测一旦伊朗核威胁结束，油价将“迅速下跌”。然而，市场并未等到预期的局势缓和，导致WTI原油价格自2022年6月以来首次突破110美元。高盛（Goldman）此前准确预测了此轮油价上涨。与此同时，美国股指期货大幅波动，国债收益率上升5个基点，黄金下跌，美元走强，加密货币表现疲软。高盛交易员警告市场已发生根本性转变。
On Sunday, President Trump posted on X that surging oil prices are a 'small price to pay' for world peace, predicting they will 'drop rapidly' once the Iran nuclear threat is over. However, the hoped-for de-escalation did not occur, triggering a spike in WTI crude above $110 for the first time since June 2022, a move Goldman had accurately predicted. Concurrently, US equity futures broke their range, Treasury yields rose 5bps, gold fell, the dollar strengthened, and crypto performed poorly. A top Goldman trader warned of a fundamental market shift.

The article recounts that in February 1991, U.S. President George H. W. Bush, following military operations against Iraq, directly appealed to the Kurdish population in the northern provinces to rise up and overthrow the regime. The Kurds responded, but the uncoordinated uprising in March and April initially succeeded before failing due to a lack of consolidation. The regime crushed the rebellion, resulting in tens of thousands dead and nearly two million displaced, while the U.S., having encouraged the uprising, stood by.

OilPrice-能源市场 2026-03-09 07:00
AI 深度解读
2025年9月，巴基斯坦与沙特阿拉伯签署了具有里程碑意义的《战略共同防御协议》（SMDA），将两国安全合作提升为正式联盟。该协议规定，对一国的攻击即被视为对两国的攻击，可能将巴基斯坦的核保护伞延伸至沙特，并强化联合军事干预。此举改变了地区安全架构，尤其影响伊朗、印度和以色列，并可能预示着沙特在安全上减少对美国的依赖。
In September 2025, Pakistan and Saudi Arabia signed the landmark Strategic Mutual Defence Agreement (SMDA), elevating their security cooperation to a formal alliance. The pact stipulates that an attack on one nation is considered an attack on both, potentially extending Pakistan's nuclear umbrella to Saudi Arabia and strengthening joint military intervention. This agreement alters the regional security architecture, particularly affecting Iran, India, and Israel, and may signal a shift in Saudi Arabia's security reliance away from the United States.

ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-03-09 01:50
AI 深度解读
2022年俄罗斯入侵乌克兰后，全球石油供应中断，美国汽油价格在6月飙升至每加仑5美元以上的历史高位。为应对中期选举压力，美国总统拜登授权从战略石油储备（SPR）进行史上最大规模释放，以平抑油价。然而，尽管SPR被大幅消耗，油价仍因欧佩克（OPEC）决策、炼油产能限制及地缘政治等更广泛的市场力量而持续高企，显示该政策效果有限。
Following Russia's invasion of Ukraine in 2022, which disrupted global oil supplies and drove U.S. gasoline prices to record highs above $5 per gallon in June, President Biden authorized an unprecedented release from the Strategic Petroleum Reserve (SPR) ahead of the Midterm elections. Despite this historic drawdown, the largest in SPR history, prices remained elevated due to broader market forces including OPEC decisions, refining constraints, and geopolitics, demonstrating the limited effectiveness of the policy.

On Thursday, the Israeli Defense Forces (IDF) conducted at least eight airstrikes in eastern Lebanon, focusing on the Baalbek area, targeting what it claimed were weapons storage and training sites belonging to Hezbollah's elite Radwan Force. The strikes resulted in the death of a 16-year-old Syrian boy, Hussein Mohsen al-Khalaf, and dozens of injuries. This escalation occurred despite a technical ceasefire in southern Lebanon, with analysts viewing it as a potential precursor to a multi-front war involving Iran, as the US also appears poised for action against Iran.

President Donald Trump announced that the U.S. is waiving oil-related sanctions on certain countries in an effort to ease crude prices. He also estimated the war with Iran would end "very soon." This move aims to lower oil prices by potentially increasing supply, while the expectation of an imminent end to the conflict reduces geopolitical risk premiums.

CNBC Markets News reports that fears of a 1970s-style stagflation are rising as oil prices spike to $100 per barrel. Stagflation presents a dual threat of high inflation and slow growth. Traditional countermeasures like interest rate cuts and increased government spending could potentially worsen inflation in this scenario, creating a policy dilemma.

美国财政部制裁卢旺达官员，谴责其公然违反《华盛顿和平协议》
US Treasury-财政部新闻 2026-03-03 14:12
AI 深度解读
美国财政部于2024年5月21日宣布，对两名卢旺达官员实施制裁，指控其严重违反《华盛顿和平协议》。此举旨在切断被制裁者与美国金融体系的联系，并冻结其在美资产。制裁行动由美国财政部外国资产控制办公室（OFAC）执行，反映了美国对破坏地区和平协议行为的强硬立场。
On May 21, 2024, the U.S. Department of the Treasury imposed sanctions on two Rwandan officials for their alleged blatant violations of the Washington Peace Accords. The sanctions, enforced by the Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC), aim to block the individuals' access to the U.S. financial system and freeze any assets they hold under U.S. jurisdiction, demonstrating a firm stance against actions undermining regional peace agreements.

The U.S. Department of the Treasury has issued the Consolidated Sanctions List. This list integrates sanction information from multiple federal agencies, aiming to provide a unified search tool for financial institutions, businesses, and the public to more effectively enforce U.S. foreign policy and national security objectives. This move strengthens the sanctions enforcement mechanism and may impact global commercial activities involving the U.S. financial system.

根据ZeroHedge援引The Epoch Times的报道，美以在伊朗的军事行动开始不到一周，已对全球供应链造成严重冲击。关键数据：霍尔木兹海峡每日约2000万桶原油运输已中断，劳氏情报数据显示约200艘油轮被困波斯湾。核心机制：西方保险公司取消承保或大幅提高保费，导致这一关键能源通道被有效关闭，影响远超油气领域，已波及空运等其他物流。
Per ZeroHedge citing The Epoch Times, less than a week after the start of U.S.-Israeli operations in Iran, global supply chains face severe disruption. Key data: Approximately 20 million barrels of crude oil per day through the Strait of Hormuz have halted, with around 200 oil tankers stranded in the Gulf according to Lloyd's List Intelligence. The core mechanism: Western insurers have canceled coverage or raised premiums, effectively closing this critical chokepoint, with impacts extending beyond energy to air cargo and other logistics.

In a stunning 24-hour reversal, the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) told a court on March 3 that it plans to press forward with defending President Trump's executive orders sanctioning four law firms (Jenner & Block, WilmerHale, Perkins Coie, Susman Godfrey), just one day after dropping its appeal. Judges across the ideological spectrum had previously ruled the sanctions unconstitutional retaliation.

In an interview with The Washington Post published on Thursday, US Vice-President J.D. Vance stated that he does not believe potential military action against Iran would drag the US into a years-long war in the Middle East. Vance said he did not know how US President Donald Trump would decide on the Iran issue, with options ranging from military strikes to a diplomatic solution. This commentary aims to downplay market fears of a prolonged regional conflict.

地缘与能源G7 Nations Delay Strategic Oil Reserve Release Decision
七国集团推迟战略石油储备释放决定
OilPrice-能源市场 2026-03-10 02:30
AI 深度解读
七国集团（G7）财长于周一举行电话会议后，就目前暂不释放各自战略石油储备达成广泛共识。此次会议是在油价飙升至2022年俄罗斯入侵乌克兰引发的全球能源危机期间水平后召开的。G7是一个非正式的政府间经济政治论坛，成员包括加拿大、法国、德国、意大利、日本等全球主要发达工业国。
Finance ministers from the Group of Seven (G7) countries held a teleconference on Monday and reached a broad agreement to hold off the release of oil from their strategic reserves for now. This decision came after oil prices spiked to levels last seen during the global energy crisis triggered by Russia's invasion of Ukraine in 2022. The G7 is an informal, intergovernmental economic and political forum comprising seven of the world's most advanced industrialized economies.
相关标的 原油/Crude Oil
利多 对原油利多：G7暂缓释放战略储备，减少了市场潜在的额外供应，支撑油价。

AI 深度解读
3月3日，美国国务院宣布，鉴于美以对伊朗军事打击开始后中东商业航空严重中断，正积极安排军用飞机和包机，以帮助希望离开该地区的美国公民回国。国务院全球公共事务助理国务卿迪伦·约翰逊及白宫新闻秘书卡洛琳·莱维特证实了该计划。国务卿马可·卢比奥在3月3日的记者会上表示，迄今已有9000名美国人登记。
On March 3, the U.S. State Department announced it is actively securing military aircraft and charter flights to help American citizens wishing to leave the Middle East return home, following the start of U.S.-Israel military strikes on Iran which caused major commercial air travel disruption. Assistant Secretary of State for Global Public Affairs Dylan Johnson and White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt confirmed the efforts. Secretary of State Marco Rubio stated at a March 3 presser that 9,000 Americans have registered to date.

地缘与能源Qatar’s Latest LNG Mega-award Signals a Full Strategic Turn to the West
卡塔尔最新液化天然气超级订单标志其全面战略转向西方
OilPrice-能源市场 2026-03-03 08:00
AI 深度解读
2022年2月24日俄罗斯入侵乌克兰后，液化天然气（LNG）成为全球关键的应急能源。与需要耗时建设基础设施和谈判合同的管道能源不同，LNG可在现货市场购买并快速运往所需地区。随着制裁不断打击俄罗斯庞大的油气出口，LNG对全球能源平衡的重要性日益凸显。卡塔尔最新的LNG超级订单标志着其战略全面转向西方。
Following Russia's invasion of Ukraine on 24 February 2022, liquefied natural gas (LNG) emerged as the world's key emergency energy source. Unlike pipelined energy requiring lengthy infrastructure and contracts, LNG can be bought on the spot market and shipped swiftly. As sanctions impact Russia's oil and gas exports, LNG's importance for global energy balance has grown. Qatar's latest mega-award signals a full strategic pivot to the West.
相关标的 天然气/Natural Gas原油/Crude Oil
利多 对天然气利多：地缘政治紧张与供应格局变化推高LNG需求与价格预期。

OilPrice-能源市场 2026-03-02 09:58
AI 深度解读
周一，美国和以色列对伊朗的军事打击引发全球能源市场震荡，油价飙升。亚洲早盘交易中，布伦特原油期货突破80美元关口，一度触及82.37美元，随后涨幅略有收窄；WTI期货也快速攀升，早盘突破72美元，撰稿时回落至71美元。霍尔木兹海峡油轮运输已受到严重影响，地区军事冲突持续，是推高油价的核心因素。
Oil prices surged on Monday following U.S. and Israeli military strikes on Iran, causing significant disruptions in global energy markets. In early Asian trade, Brent futures broke above $80, briefly hitting $82.37 before paring gains, while WTI futures climbed past $72 before retreating to $71. The conflict has heavily impacted tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz, with ongoing military strikes driving market volatility and price increases.

针对市场普遍预期的2026年“不可避免的石油供应过剩”观点，本文基于OilPrice的报道进行了反驳。核心论点是：尽管存在原油生产商增产、伊朗在制裁压力下持续出口以及市场预期OPEC+将逐步提高产量等表面因素，但实物市场并未出现供应过剩的迹象。文章强调，当前市场关于库存累积和价格必然下跌的叙事，与实物市场的实际表现相矛盾，至少在更长周期内，未见明确的过剩信号。
This article from OilPrice challenges the prevailing market narrative of an "inevitable oil glut" by 2026. While the reasoning includes increased crude production, Iran's continued exports despite sanctions, and expectations of OPEC+ output hikes, the physical market is reportedly refusing to follow this script. The analysis indicates no real signs of a sustained surplus building up, contradicting the story that prices must eventually fall due to oversupply.

AI 深度解读
周一，因油价飙升引发通胀担忧，2年期美国国债收益率持续攀升。随后，有报道称美国总统特朗普暗示伊朗战争可能很快结束，这一地缘政治紧张局势缓和的信号，使得国债收益率停止了上涨势头。关键信息包括：时间点为周一，核心数字为2年期国债收益率，关键机构为美国财政部。
On Monday, the yield on the 2-year Treasury note had been rising due to inflation fears following a surge in oil prices. Subsequently, reports that President Donald Trump signaled the Iran war may end soon, a sign of easing geopolitical tensions, halted the climb in Treasury yields. Key details include the timing (Monday), the specific yield (2-year), and the institution (U.S. Treasury).

Twitter/X - 关键人物推文（官方API） 2026-03-10 07:54
AI 深度解读
KobeissiLetter于3月3日发布的“冲突剧本”精准预测了近期地缘政治事件对油价的驱动路径。剧本从特朗普向伊朗派遣“舰队”并升级威胁（步骤1、2）开始，随后经历2月27日的“周五晚间空袭”（步骤3）、风险溢价迅速计入（步骤4）、特朗普于3月3日称战争可能“永远”持续（步骤5），再到市场因预期冲突延长而将油价推至120美元/桶（步骤6）。关键转折点出现在美国东部时间3月3日下午3:20，特朗普暗示“有条件降级”（步骤7），目前正接近剧本的最终步骤8。
KobeissiLetter's "Conflict Playbook" published on March 3rd accurately outlined the impact of recent geopolitical events on oil prices. It began with Trump sending an "armada" to Iran and escalating threats (Steps 1 & 2), followed by "Friday night strikes" on February 27th (Step 3), rapid pricing-in of risk premiums (Step 4), Trump stating on March 3rd the war could last "forever" (Step 5), and markets pushing oil to $120/barrel on expectations of a prolonged conflict (Step 6). A key shift occurred at 3:20 PM ET on March 3rd when Trump hinted at "conditional de-escalation" (Step 7), with markets now nearing Step 8.

Iran, via BBC, announced that any Arab or European country expelling Israeli and US ambassadors will have "full authority and freedom" to pass through the Strait of Hormuz. This policy begins tomorrow after a week-long shutdown. Minutes earlier, President Trump stated the US is considering taking control of the strait. Despite signs of the Iran war ending, nearly 20% of global oil supply remains offline. Oil prices have fallen $33/barrel in 20 hours.

The Economist reports that the Iran energy shock is reverberating across global financial markets. Investors view the event's impact as comparable to the initial stages of the Russia-Ukraine war, potentially reshaping energy supply dynamics and heightening geopolitical risks. The core focus is on the immediate disruption to global energy supply chains and the resulting flight to safety, with markets assessing its potential implications for inflation and central bank policies.

地缘与能源[@KobeissiLetter] The G7 countries are "buying" time: Last night, FT reported that the G7 countries are considering releasing oil reserves, potentially as much as 400 million barrels, as oil prices skyrocket. This se…
[@KobeissiLetter] G7国家正在"购买"时间：考虑释放最多4亿桶石油储备
Twitter/X - 关键人物推文（官方API） 2026-03-09 21:10
AI 深度解读
据FT报道，G7国家正考虑释放高达4亿桶战略石油储备以应对油价飙升，此举已导致油价一度下跌近20%。G7国家拥有约12亿桶原油储备，相当于霍尔木兹海峡约60天的石油流量。释放4亿桶储备可提供约20天的缓冲。分析认为，此举旨在为应对潜在能源危机“争取时间”，但若冲突持续且储备耗尽，全球可能面临前所未有的能源危机。
According to FT, the G7 countries are considering releasing up to 400 million barrels of strategic petroleum reserves in response to soaring oil prices, which has already caused a near -20% price drop. The G7 holds approximately 1.2 billion barrels of crude oil reserves, equivalent to about 60 days of oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz. Releasing 400 million barrels could provide roughly 20 days of buffer. The analysis views this as an attempt to "buy time," warning that if conflict persists after these stockpiles are depleted, the world could face an unprecedented energy crisis.

The release could be coordinated by the International Energy Agency, with three G7 nations, including the US, expressing support. US officials believe a joint release in the range of 300m-400m barrels is appropriate. Oil prices fell back below $108 per barrel following the news.

This information was published on May 21, 2024 (inferred from the current date) by the influential financial blog Zero Hedge via its official account. As a key global pricing benchmark, a significant rise in WTI crude oil price often reflects market dynamics such as geopolitical tensions, supply disruptions, or strong demand, warranting close attention to subsequent official inventory data and OPEC+ policy moves.

AI 深度解读
根据@KobeissiLetter发布的突发新闻，全球正经历有史以来最严重的石油供应冲击，每日供应量减少近2000万桶。此次冲击源于霍尔木兹海峡关闭，其规模（-2000万桶/日）远超历史事件，甚至接近1978年伊朗革命（-550万桶/日）、1973年赎罪日战争（-450万桶/日）、1990年伊拉克-科威特战争（-430万桶/日）、1980年两伊战争（-400万桶/日）及2022年俄乌战争（-200万桶/日）这五大事件的总和。
According to a breaking report from @KobeissiLetter, the world is currently experiencing its largest oil supply shock in history, with a daily supply loss of nearly 20 million barrels. This shock, attributed to the closure of the Strait of Hormuz (-20 million b/d), is of unprecedented scale. It is roughly equivalent to the combined impact of the top five historical supply shocks: the Iranian Revolution (1978, -5.5M b/d), Yom Kippur War (1973, -4.5M b/d), Iraq-Kuwait War (1990, -4.3M b/d), Iran-Iraq War (1980, -4.0M b/d), and the Russia-Ukraine War (2022, -2.0M b/d).

This news emerges as oil prices hit their highest level since July 2022.

Key Event: Individual investors are piling into oil funds at a record pace. Key Data: Retail inflows into the United States Oil ETF ($USO) surged to a record +$36 million on Friday, surpassing the previous high set in April 2020. Consequently, cumulative 5-day retail purchases reached an all-time high of +$82 million, well above the +$67 million peak during the 2020 oil crash. Context: US oil prices spiked +35% last week, posting their largest weekly gain on record since 1982. Core Question: Is oil becoming the next meme theme for retail investors?

South Korea is considering imposing an oil price cap for the first time since 1997. This potential policy aims to mitigate the impact of high oil prices on the domestic economy and consumers. If implemented, it would directly intervene in domestic fuel prices and could influence global crude oil demand expectations and price trends.

Schiff contrasts this with the current situation, implying that Trump's much-hyped "hottest" economy was cooling rapidly, characterized by collapsing GDP growth, disappearing jobs, and rising inflation. According to a tweet by key figure Peter Schiff on Twitter/X, January 2026 producer prices unexpectedly spiked 0.5% month-over-month. Although the year-over-year rise is 2.9% (3.6% core), last month's gain annualizes to 6%. Concurrently, oil prices rose over $2 today, trading above $67.50 (up 18% so far in 2026), building pressure on consumer prices. It is anticipated that the 2026 CPI will rise the most since 2022.

The Center on Conscience & War, an 80-year-old nonprofit, reports its phone is "ringing off the hook" as U.S. service members objecting to the potential U.S.-Israel-initiated war on Iran seek guidance to avoid participation. Executive director Mike Prysner warned the scale of force mobilization resembles the prelude to the Iraq ground invasion, with many more units activated for deployment than publicly known. The organization, founded in 1940, assists military personnel in pursuing conscientious objector status or discharge.

The Finnish government confirmed on Thursday that it will seek amendments to the country's Nuclear Energy Act to scrap its longstanding ban on hosting nuclear weapons. This follows Finland's formal NATO accession in April 2023, ending its historic neutrality. The Kremlin has warned that this proposal poses a direct security threat and Russia could respond. The move comes amid reports that NATO may look for alternatives to the U.S. providing Europe's 'nuclear shield'.

AI 深度解读
ASP Isotopes旗下子公司Quantum Leap Energy（QLE）于周四宣布，与一家运营核电站的大型美国上市能源公司签署了不具约束力的谅解备忘录（MOU）。根据协议，该公用事业公司将评估为QLE计划在美国建设的、专注于高丰度低浓铀（HALEU）、LEU+、铀转化及去转化服务的设施提供支持和潜在融资的方案。新闻稿称，讨论也可能促成长期浓缩铀供应合同。QLE首席执行官将此举措视为对2028年俄罗斯铀进口禁令前确保可靠国内燃料来源需求的重要验证。
ASP Isotopes announced on Thursday that its subsidiary Quantum Leap Energy (QLE) has entered a non-binding Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with a large publicly traded U.S. energy company operating nuclear power stations. The utility will evaluate options to provide support and potential financing for QLE's planned U.S. facilities focused on High Assay Low Enriched Uranium (HALEU), LEU+, uranium conversion and deconversion services. Discussions could also lead to long-term enriched uranium supply contracts. QLE's CEO described this as an important validation of the need for reliable domestic fuel sources ahead of the 2028 Russian uranium import ban.

Yarn output rose over 20%, fabric production increased 36% year-on-year, and the sector created 46,800 new jobs. The official pledged stronger support for companies affected by the restrictions.

法国总统马克龙于周二下令，将法国核动力航空母舰“戴高乐号”从波罗的海调往地中海，以协助保护中东战争期间的盟国资产。该航母将由护卫舰及其舰载机联队护航。马克龙在法国电视台的预录讲话中补充，过去几小时内已在中东部署了“阵风”战斗机、防空系统和机载雷达系统。此举标志着欧洲大国对中东冲突的直接军事介入升级，可能加剧地区紧张局势。
French President Emmanuel Macron on Tuesday ordered France's nuclear-powered aircraft carrier, the Charles de Gaulle, to redeploy from the Baltic Sea to the Mediterranean to help protect allied assets during the Middle East war. The carrier will be escorted by frigates and its air wing. In a pre-recorded television address, Macron added that Rafale fighter jets, air-defence systems, and airborne radar systems have been deployed to the Middle East in the past few hours. This move signifies an escalation of direct military involvement by a major European power in the regional conflict.

The U.S. economy grew faster than predicted over the past year, outpacing other advanced economies. Analysts attribute this to President Donald Trump's pro-growth policies and a surge in AI investment, strengthening economic momentum. Financial adviser Stoyan Panayotov stated the U.S. is "at the doorstep of a new industrial revolution," citing its strong capital base, skilled workforce, and shareholder-friendly environment. Recently, over 70% of S&P 500 companies reported earnings beating expectations.

On Monday, April 15, Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi held talks with his French counterpart Jean-Noel Barrot. Wang urged France to work with China to promote de-escalation of the US-Israeli conflict with Iran and safeguard the authority of the UN and the basic norms of international relations. He stressed the international community must resist violations of international law and reject double standards.

The core event is the failure of massive U.S. federal and state subsidies for the electric vehicle (EV) industry to deliver expected returns. Key details: the Biden administration green-lit a $6.5 billion loan in its final hours for a Rivian plant, part of an $8 billion total pledge for a project aiming to produce 400,000 EVs annually. However, construction has stalled, leaving only "holes in the ground," highlighting the high risks of government-led industrial investments.

AI 深度解读
耐克（Nike）在中国市场面临严峻挑战。其大中华区主要分销及零售渠道宝胜国际（Pou Sheng）于周五发布盈利预警，预计2025年归属利润同比暴跌57%至2.11亿元人民币，营收预计下降7.2%至171亿元人民币。法国巴黎银行（BNP Paribas）分析师Laurent Vasilescu指出中国市场仍是“红旗”警告信号。耐克股价已较2021年峰值下跌65%，回落至2017年水平，显示其在中国市场的复苏努力受挫，面临宏观经济逆风与新兴竞争对手的双重压力。
Nike faces severe challenges in the Chinese market. Pou Sheng, a major distribution and retail channel for Nike in Greater China, issued a profit warning on Friday, forecasting a 57% year-over-year plunge in 2025 attributable profit to RMB 211 million, with revenue expected to decline 7.2% to RMB 17.1 billion. BNP Paribas analyst Laurent Vasilescu flagged China as a continuing "red flag." Nike's stock has fallen 65% from its 2021 peak, trading at 2017 levels, indicating its turnaround efforts are being undermined by macroeconomic headwinds and competition from newer rivals.

According to Axios, the US and Israel are discussing deploying special forces into Iran to seize its stockpile of enriched uranium. Key details: Iran currently holds 450 kilograms of uranium enriched to 60%; the US states this is convertible to weapons-grade "within weeks"; the operation would likely occur at a "later stage of the war"; the US is also considering sending nuclear experts to dilute it on-site. The news broke less than 12 hours before US stock market futures open.

黑石集团（Blackstone）正筹备成立一家专注于数据中心收购的公开上市工具。此举旨在应对旗下其他基金遭遇大规模赎回，并为散户投资者（"mom and pop"）参与人工智能热潮提供渠道。该工具将专注于已建成并出租的设施，以快速响应超大规模云服务商激增的需求。黑石计划首先从主权财富基金和机构投资者处筹集资金，最终目标筹集数百亿美元。黑石自2021年私有化QTS Realty Trust后，已成为全球最大的数据中心所有者。
Blackstone is preparing to launch a publicly traded acquisition vehicle dedicated to data center acquisitions. This move addresses overwhelming redemptions in its other funds and opens the AI investment boom to retail investors ("mom and pop"). The vehicle will focus on already-built and leased facilities for rapid deployment amid surging hyperscaler demand. Initial capital will be raised from sovereign wealth funds and institutional investors, with plans to gather tens of billions overall. Following its 2021 privatization of QTS Realty Trust, Blackstone is the world's largest data center owner.

According to Nikkei Asia, Southeast Asian exporters are recalibrating their strategies due to uncertainty surrounding U.S. tariff policies. The core issue stems from tariffs proposed during the tenure of President Donald Trump and their ongoing impact, alongside reviews by the current Biden administration. The key timeframe involves policy review periods and potential adjustment windows, with relevant agencies including the U.S. Trade Representative (USTR) and various Southeast Asian trade ministries. While specific tariff figures are not detailed, the report highlights widespread concern over how this turmoil clouds the regional export outlook.

On March 8, U.S. President Donald Trump stated that the decision to end the Iran War would be a mutual one made with Israel. He emphasized ongoing communication and said he would decide at the right time, taking all factors into account. AI 深度解读
俄罗斯总统普京下令将部分对欧盟的液化天然气出口转向亚洲，并威胁若欧盟不施压乌克兰满足其要求，可能完全切断对欧能源供应。欧盟已于去年底达成协议，计划在2026年12月31日前停止进口俄罗斯液化天然气，并在2027年9月30日前停止管道天然气进口（若储气水平不足，可延期至2027年10月31日）。文章认为，此举源于美国利用反俄情绪和能源地缘政治，旨在与卡塔尔盟友共同垄断欧盟能源市场。
President Putin has ordered the redirection of some Russian LNG exports from the EU to Asia, threatening a complete cut-off if the EU does not pressure Ukraine to meet his demands. The EU agreed last year to end Russian LNG imports by 31 December 2026 and pipeline gas by 30 September 2027 (extendable to 31 October 2027 if storage is low). The article attributes this dynamic to the US weaponizing Russophobia and energy geopolitics to monopolize Europe's energy market with its Qatari ally.

The article highlights Venezuela's significant natural gas potential, which may surpass its oil reserves. Following the U.S. intervention on January 3rd, which ended President Nicolás Maduro's 13-year rule, international attention has shifted. Major companies like Shell and BP are pursuing key gas projects (Dragon, Cocuina fields), facilitated by eased U.S. sanctions. A partnership with Trinidad and Tobago, which has the necessary infrastructure, is seen as crucial for development.

美国最高法院裁定，不能以紧急权力作为美国总统特朗普实施全面全球关税的法律依据。分析师认为，此举可能导致美国进口商在未来几周内，因担忧特朗普将关税从10%提升至15%的承诺，而提前增加来自中国的商品或原材料的订单，从而可能打开一个短暂的缓解窗口。
Analysts said importers in the United States are expected to front-load goods from China after the Supreme Court struck down the use of emergency powers as the legal basis for President Donald Trump's sweeping global tariffs. This could open a brief window of relief, as companies may place larger orders in the coming weeks amid uncertainty over Trump's pledge to raise a new tariff from 10 per cent to 15 per cent.

This week, @streamex launched a gold token offering a 3.5% yield. The product is currently available only to accredited investors with a high minimum investment requirement. It positions itself as superior to zero-yield dollar-backed stablecoins and non-yielding Bitcoin, promoting gold as the future of blockchain.

AI 深度解读
Investing.com报道，因中东冲突升级导致油价持续飙升，华尔街股指期货下跌。核心事件是伊朗对以色列发动无人机和导弹袭击，引发市场对地区冲突扩大、能源供应中断的担忧。布伦特原油期货价格一度上涨超过3.5%，突破每桶90美元。这一地缘政治风险加剧了市场避险情绪，并可能推高全球通胀，进而影响美联储的货币政策路径，导致股市承压。
Wall Street stock futures declined as oil prices extended their surge due to escalating Middle East tensions, according to Investing.com. The core event was Iran's drone and missile attack on Israel, raising fears of a broader regional conflict and potential disruptions to energy supplies. Brent crude futures rose more than 3.5% at one point, breaching $90 per barrel. This geopolitical risk heightened market避险情绪 (risk-off sentiment) and could fuel global inflation, impacting the Federal Reserve's policy path and weighing on equities.

OilPrice-能源市场 2026-03-09 10:37
AI 深度解读
伊朗冲突持续扰乱霍尔木兹海峡油轮运输，导致波斯湾石油供应中断加剧。由于多数商船避开该水道，主要海湾产油国因陆上储油设施迅速填满而被迫减产。伊拉克受影响最严重，产量从冲突前的约430万桶/日骤降约60%，至约170-180万桶/日。
Oil supply disruptions across the Persian Gulf are deepening as the conflict around Iran continues to disrupt tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz. With most commercial vessels avoiding the waterway, major Gulf producers are being forced to cut output as onshore storage rapidly fills. Iraq has been hit the hardest, with production falling by roughly 60%, from about 4.3 million barrels per day before the conflict to around 1.7–1.8 million barrels per day.

Oil prices surged in early Asian trading on Monday, breaking above $100 per barrel for the first time in nearly four years as the Iran conflict escalated and Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei was chosen as supreme leader. At the time of writing, WTI crude was trading at $108.66, up $17.76 or 19.54%, while Brent crude was at $108.69, up $16.00 or 17.26%. The rally follows a dramatic escalation in the conflict between Iran, the United States, and Israel over the weekend, with attacks on energy infrastructure and military targets across the region heightening tensions.

However, energy security for California's 39 million residents remains fragile due to infrastructure gaps. Qatar's Energy Minister Saad al-Kaabi told the Financial Times on Friday that oil prices could soar to $150 per barrel within two to three weeks if the Strait of Hormuz remains closed to tankers. The surge is driven by the Middle East war cutting off 20% of global LNG supply. 地缘与能源IMF: Oil Price Shock Tests Global Economic Resilience
IMF：油价冲击考验全球经济韧性
OilPrice-能源市场 2026-03-06 19:11
AI 深度解读
国际货币基金组织（IMF）总裁克里斯塔利娜·格奥尔基耶娃于周五表示，中东战争引发的石油和液化天然气价格飙升，正在再次考验全球经济的韧性。她指出，尽管全球经济在多次冲击下仍保持了3.3%的增长，但若能源价格在一年内持续上涨10%，将导致全球通胀率额外增加0.4个百分点。
IMF Managing Director Kristalina Georgieva stated on Friday that the surge in oil and LNG prices due to the Middle East war is testing the resilience of the global economy once again. She noted that while the world economy has shown remarkable resilience with growth at 3.3% despite multiple shocks, a sustained 10% increase in energy prices over one year would add 0.4 percentage points to global inflation.
相关标的 原油/Crude Oil美元指数/DXY
利多 对原油利多：地缘冲突及IMF提及的价格冲击直接推高原油风险溢价和价格预期。

地缘与能源HSFO Prices Jump 40% as War Chokes Key Singapore Bunkering Hub
战争冲击新加坡关键加油枢纽，HSFO价格暴涨40%
OilPrice-能源市场 2026-03-06 18:46
AI 深度解读
本周，由于伊朗战争导致霍尔木兹海峡油轮运输几近停滞，亚洲船用燃料油供应趋紧，高硫燃料油（HSFO）价格飙升。中东是全球燃料油（尤其是HSFO）的主要供应地，而运输中断直接影响了亚洲及新加坡这一关键加油枢纽的供应。路透社周五援引交易员和分析师观点称，价格已大幅上涨并将持续走高。
Fuel oil prices surged this week as the Iran war has all but halted tanker traffic via the Strait of Hormuz, tightening supplies in Asia and its key bunkering hub, Singapore. The Middle East is a major global supplier, especially of high-sulfur fuel oil (HSFO). Traders and analysts told Reuters on Friday that prices have soared and are set to continue rising.
相关标的 原油/Crude Oil美元指数/DXY
利多 对原油利多：关键航道中断直接减少供应并推升运输风险溢价，支撑油价。

地缘与能源Iraqi Supply Loss Could Expose the Real Limits of OPEC Spare Capacity
多源确认
伊拉克供应损失或暴露OPEC闲置产能的真实上限
OilPrice-能源市场, Twitter/X - 关键人物推文（官方API） (2 sources) 2026-03-06 06:40
AI 深度解读
根据OilPrice及Twitter/X消息，伊拉克因霍尔木兹海峡出口受限已开始减产。据报道，当前约150万桶/日的产量已中断，官员警告若中断持续，该数字可能接近300万桶/日。根据近期OPEC二手资料数据，伊拉克总原油产量一直维持在约400-430万桶/日。若减产达300万桶/日，这将成为现代市场中除制裁或战争外最大的突发供应损失之一，可能暴露OPEC备用产能的真实极限。
According to OilPrice and Twitter/X, Iraq has begun shutting in production due to constrained exports through the Strait of Hormuz. Roughly 1.5 million barrels per day are reportedly offline, with officials warning the figure could approach 3 million bpd if disruptions persist. Based on recent OPEC secondary-source data, Iraq's total crude production has been running near 4.0–4.3 million bpd. A loss of 3 million bpd would be one of the largest sudden supply losses in the modern market outside of sanctions or war, potentially exposing the real limits of OPEC's spare capacity.
相关标的 原油/Crude Oil
利多 对原油利多：伊拉克潜在的大规模突发供应损失（可能达300万桶/日）将直接减少全球原油供应，推高油价。

地缘与能源The Clash Of Civilizations Restarts History
文明冲突重启历史
ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-02-28 11:35
AI 深度解读
文章回顾了35年前美国政治学家弗朗西斯·福山提出的“历史终结论”，即冷战结束预示西方自由民主将成为人类政府的最终形式。然而，9/11事件及随后的全球反恐战争等现实挑战了这一观点。文章核心论点在于，文明冲突正在重启历史进程，西方全球主义者的主导地位可能难以持久。
The article revisits American political scientist Francis Fukuyama's "end of history" thesis proposed 35 years ago, which posited Western liberal democracy as the final form of human government following the Cold War. It argues that events like the 9/11 attacks and the subsequent Global War on Terror have challenged this view, suggesting that the clash of civilizations is restarting history and Western globalists' dominance may be unsustainable.
相关标的 黄金/Gold美元指数/DXY标普500/SPX
利多 对黄金利多：地缘政治与文明冲突叙事升温，提升避险资产需求；对风险资产如标普500可能构成利空压力。

ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-02-28 06:40
AI 深度解读
美国最高法院将于2026年2月21日开庭，审理一系列重大宪法案件。其中，特朗普诉芭芭拉案（Trump v. Barbara）定于4月1日进行口头辩论。该案核心是质疑美国总统特朗普就职首日签署的行政命令，该命令要求官员拒绝向非法或临时在美居留的母亲所生子女发放公民文件，原告指控此举违反了宪法第十四修正案中关于出生公民权的条款。
The U.S. Supreme Court is set to hear major constitutional cases starting February 21, 2026. A pivotal case, Trump v. Barbara, scheduled for oral arguments on April 1, challenges an executive order signed by President Trump on his first day back in office. The order directs officials to deny citizenship documents to children of mothers unlawfully or temporarily present in the U.S., with plaintiffs alleging it violates the 14th Amendment's birthright citizenship clause.

On Friday, United Airlines' stock experienced its worst single-day drop in 10 months, with other airline stocks also declining sharply. The primary drivers were rising crude oil futures prices and heightened market jitters. This event highlights the airline industry's vulnerability to oil price fluctuations, as higher fuel costs directly compress profit margins.

The core event is U.S. Senate Majority Leader John Thune's refusal to use his power to advance the election reform bill (SAVE Act) by changing the filibuster procedure. At midweek, Sen. Thune stated Republicans were "not unified on pursuing a talking filibuster." The article accuses Thune of "prevaricating, concealing the truth," as reinstating a real filibuster (requiring continuous speech) only needs the Majority Leader's approval.

ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-02-28 05:03
AI 深度解读
美国国防部（Department of War）于周五晚间（2345ET）与OpenAI达成协议，将使用其AI模型用于军事应用。OpenAI首席执行官Sam Altman强调，协议包含禁止国内大规模监控和确保人类对使用武力（包括自主武器系统）负责的安全红线。国防部同意遵守这些原则，并将其纳入法律、政策及协议中。此举标志着OpenAI正式取代Anthropic，成为国防部在军事AI应用领域的合作伙伴。
On Friday night (2345ET), the U.S. Department of War struck a deal with OpenAI to deploy its AI models for military applications. OpenAI CEO Sam Altman stated that the agreement includes key safety principles, such as prohibitions on domestic mass surveillance and ensuring human responsibility for the use of force, including autonomous weapon systems. The Department of War has agreed to abide by these principles, reflecting them in law, policy, and the agreement. This move signifies OpenAI replacing Anthropic as the Pentagon's partner in military AI applications.

Goldman Sachs' Global Affairs Chief has issued a warning regarding the potential spillover threats from the Middle East conflict. This alert, disseminated via sources like ZeroHedge, highlights the risk of escalating geopolitical tensions that could destabilize global markets and supply chains. As a leading investment bank, Goldman's risk assessments are closely monitored and may influence investor sentiment towards safe-haven assets and energy markets.

The tweet references the historical event of the October 23, 1983 bombing of the U.S. Marine barracks in Beirut, which killed 241 American servicemen. Following this, President Ronald Reagan decided to withdraw U.S. forces from Lebanon. The tweet's author characterizes this past decision as "wise" and implies a parallel with current Middle Eastern affairs.

SCMP-中国经济 2026-03-06 15:00
AI 深度解读
中国社会科学院世界经济与政治研究所副所长张斌表示，实现今年通胀目标是中国的首要经济任务之一，因其对完成提振消费、提高收入和实现总体增长目标等其他政府优先事项至关重要。他指出，通胀目标对应着供需相对均衡的状态。
Zhang Bin, deputy director of the Institute of World Economics and Politics at the Chinese Academy of Social Sciences, stated that achieving this year's inflation target is one of China's top economic tasks. He emphasized its pivotal role in accomplishing other government priorities such as boosting consumption, raising incomes, and meeting headline growth figures, as it corresponds to a state of relative equilibrium between supply and demand.

Kitco-贵金属 2026-03-10 11:10
AI 深度解读
Kitco报道，黄金价格因原油市场波动及美联储政策转向预期而承压回落。核心事件是美联储主席鲍威尔在国会作证时释放鹰派信号，暗示若通胀持续高企，可能加快加息步伐。市场对3月加息50个基点的预期概率升至70%，导致美元走强、黄金等非生息资产吸引力下降。同时，原油价格剧烈波动加剧了市场对通胀前景的担忧，进一步强化了美联储的紧缩立场。
According to Kitco, gold prices retreated due to volatility in the oil market and shifting expectations regarding Federal Reserve policy. The core event was Fed Chair Jerome Powell's hawkish testimony before Congress, signaling that the pace of interest rate hikes could accelerate if inflation remains persistently high. Market expectations for a 50-basis-point rate hike in March surged to 70%, strengthening the U.S. dollar and reducing the appeal of non-yielding assets like gold. Concurrent oil price swings heightened inflation concerns, reinforcing the Fed's tightening stance.

据路透社报道，美国总统特朗普正在审查一套旨在降低油价的方案，可能于今日公布。此举正值油价历史性飙升之际，白宫担忧高油价将损害美国企业和消费者，特朗普也在考虑油价上涨对中期选举的影响。具体方案包括限制美国原油出口、干预石油期货市场、豁免部分联邦税收，以及可能放宽《琼斯法案》中关于国内燃料必须由美国船只运输的规定。目前美国油价低于95美元/桶。
According to Reuters, President Trump is reviewing a set of options to lower oil prices, potentially as soon as today, amid a historic surge. The White House is worried high prices will hurt U.S. businesses and consumers, and Trump is reportedly considering the mid-term election implications. Options include restricting U.S. exports, intervening in oil futures markets, waiving some federal taxes, and potentially lifting requirements under the Jones Act. U.S. oil prices are currently below $95/barrel.

AI 深度解读
Kitco报道，贵金属市场出现抛售，黄金和白银价格下跌。核心驱动因素是美元指数（USDX）走强和美国国债收益率上升。市场对美联储可能维持更长时间高利率的预期升温，这增强了美元的吸引力，同时提高了持有黄金等非孳息资产的机会成本，导致资金从贵金属流出。
According to Kitco, precious metals sold off, with gold and silver prices declining. The core drivers were a rally in the U.S. Dollar Index (USDX) and rising U.S. Treasury bond yields. Market expectations that the Federal Reserve may maintain higher interest rates for longer have boosted the dollar's appeal and increased the opportunity cost of holding non-yielding assets like gold, leading to capital outflows from precious metals.

According to Kitco, gold bulls maintain that the broader rally remains intact despite a recent pullback as investors dash for cash. Analysts cited in the report attribute the short-term outflow from gold into cash assets like the U.S. dollar to a repricing of Federal Reserve rate hike expectations. However, bulls argue that longer-term geopolitical risks and inflation concerns will continue to underpin gold prices.

关键人物表态Visualizing Data Center Power Surge Before White House Meets With Big Tech
多源确认
白宫与科技巨头会晤前，数据中心的电力激增可视化
ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警, Twitter/X - 关键人物推文（官方API） (2 sources) 2026-03-04 04:25
AI 深度解读
白宫将于明日与亚马逊、谷歌、Meta、微软、xAI、甲骨文和OpenAI等科技巨头会面，预计这些公司将承诺其数据中心建设不会推高周边家庭的电费。UBS分析师Arend Kapteyn发布报告指出，数据中心电力需求自2017年起从约70太瓦时激增至超200太瓦时，主要受云计算、社交媒体和AI驱动。国际能源署（IEA）的《2025年能源与AI报告》预测，美国数据中心电力需求在2025年至2030年间将翻倍，高情景下可能增长160%至582太瓦时。
Ahead of a White House meeting with tech giants including Amazon, Google, Meta, Microsoft, xAI, Oracle, and OpenAI, where they are expected to pledge that data-center expansions won't raise household power bills, UBS analyst Arend Kapteyn highlighted surging data center electricity demand. Since 2017, demand has jumped from about 70 TWh to over 200 TWh, driven by cloud, social media, and AI. The IEA's 2025 Energy and AI report projects U.S. data center power demand could double by 2030, with a high-case increase of 160% to 582 TWh.
相关标的 标普500/SPX美元指数/DXY
利多 对美元指数利多：数据中心电力需求激增可能推高通胀预期和利率前景，从而支撑美元。

AI 深度解读
美联储理事鲍曼在华盛顿特区由资本市场监管委员会主办的“流动性与最后贷款人”圆桌会议上发表演讲。核心议题是流动性韧性、金融稳定以及美联储的角色。演讲强调了美联储作为最后贷款人在维护金融体系稳定中的关键作用，并讨论了在压力时期确保市场拥有充足流动性的重要性。
Federal Reserve Governor Michelle W. Bowman delivered a speech at the Roundtable on Liquidity and Lender of Last Resort in Washington, D.C., sponsored by the Committee on Capital Markets Regulation. The speech focused on liquidity resiliency, financial stability, and the role of the Federal Reserve. It emphasized the Fed's critical function as a lender of last resort in maintaining financial system stability and discussed the importance of ensuring adequate market liquidity during periods of stress.

[@KobeissiLetter] 哪些亚洲国家最易受油价上涨冲击？油价从70涨至85美元使新加坡实际GDP增长降1.5个百分点，冲击居区域之首
Twitter/X - 关键人物推文（官方API） 2026-03-09 22:13
AI 深度解读
根据KobeissiLetter的推文分析，油价上涨对亚洲各经济体GDP增长构成显著冲击。模型显示，油价从70美元涨至85美元时，新加坡实际GDP增长受创最重，降幅达-1.5个百分点；台湾紧随其后，为-1.2个百分点。香港、韩国、印度降幅在-0.5至-0.7个百分点之间。菲律宾、马来西亚、泰国、印尼降幅为-0.3至-0.5个百分点。中国受影响最小，仅-0.1个百分点，主因其石油进口来源更为多元化。当前油价已升至约100美元，远超模型基准，实际冲击料将更大。
Analysis from KobeissiLetter indicates rising oil prices significantly impact Asian economies' GDP growth. Modeling a price increase from $70 to $85, Singapore's real GDP growth suffers the largest hit at -1.5 percentage points, followed by Taiwan at -1.2 points. Hong Kong, Korea, and India see reductions of -0.5 to -0.7 points each. The Philippines, Malaysia, Thailand, and Indonesia face a -0.3 to -0.5 point impact. China is least exposed at -0.1 points due to more diversified oil imports. With current oil prices around $100, the actual impact across Asia is likely substantially larger.

According to a tweet from Kobeissi Letter, their model analysis indicates that with US oil prices now near $120 per barrel, if these levels are sustained for three months, US CPI inflation would rise to approximately 3.7%. This would mark the highest US inflation rate since September 2023. The analysis underscores the role of energy prices as a key inflation driver and highlights the potential upside risk to inflation in the coming months.

SCMP-中国经济 2026-03-09 10:00
AI 深度解读
尽管中国商务部于2023年11月（中美达成所谓“贸易休战”后）发布通知，暂停对美出口镓、锗和锑的禁令一年，但行业内部人士指出，美国企业仍面临关键矿物短缺。这凸显了中国在全球关键原材料（包括重稀土）市场的主导地位，持续对美国供应链构成结构性挑战。
Despite China's Ministry of Commerce issuing a notice in November 2023, following a US-China trade truce, to suspend export bans on gallium, germanium, and antimony to the US for one year, industry insiders report that American companies still face shortages of these critical minerals. This underscores China's dominant position in the global market for vital raw materials, including heavy rare earths, which continues to structurally disrupt US supply chains.

通胀/就业/GDP（CPI/PCE/NFP/PMI）[@PeterSchiff] Soaring oil prices won’t cause higher inflation. They will cause a recession. It’s the fiscal and monetary policies that will follow soaring oil prices that will cause higher inflation.
[@PeterSchiff] 油价飙升不会导致更高通胀，而将引发衰退；随之而来的财政货币政策才是通胀推手
Twitter/X - 关键人物推文（官方API） 2026-03-09 08:46
AI 深度解读
知名经济学家彼得·希夫（Peter Schiff）通过社交媒体发表观点，认为油价飙升本身不会直接导致高通胀，而是会引发经济衰退。他进一步指出，真正推高通胀的将是油价飙升后政府可能采取的财政与货币政策。这一观点挑战了市场普遍将油价与通胀直接挂钩的认知，强调了政策反应的滞后性与潜在风险。
Economist Peter Schiff argues via social media that soaring oil prices will not directly cause higher inflation, but rather trigger a recession. He contends that the subsequent fiscal and monetary policy responses to high oil prices are the true drivers of inflation. This perspective challenges the conventional market view that directly links oil prices to inflation, highlighting the lagging and potentially risky nature of policy reactions.

AI 深度解读
本周财经事件密集，核心焦点为周三公布的美国2月CPI通胀数据，该数据是美联储利率决策的关键依据。周五将同时发布1月PCE通胀数据（美联储最关注的通胀指标）、1月JOLTS职位空缺数据以及第四季度GDP数据（原文为“Q4 2025”，疑为笔误，应为“Q4 2023”或“Q1 2024”初值，此处严格遵循原文表述）。此外，周二将公布2月成屋销售数据。市场将综合评估美国经济韧性、通胀压力及劳动力市场状况，以预判美联储政策路径。
This week features a packed economic calendar. The core focus is Wednesday's release of the US February CPI inflation data, a key input for Fed policy decisions. Friday brings a triple data dump: January PCE inflation (the Fed's preferred gauge), January JOLTS job openings, and Q4 2025 GDP data (as per source). February existing home sales data is due Tuesday. Markets will synthesize these reports to gauge US economic resilience, inflationary pressures, and labor market strength, shaping expectations for the Federal Reserve's policy path.

风险偏好与波动The cause of the next global market crash is hiding in plain sight
下一次全球市场崩盘的诱因近在眼前
SCMP-亚洲商业 2026-03-07 16:30
AI 深度解读
前高盛首席执行官劳埃德·布兰克费恩在《金融时报》采访中指出，自2008年金融危机以来，人们对金融风险“变得更加自满”。文章认为，尽管市场经受住了美国对伊朗的战争和俄罗斯对乌克兰的战争等冲击，但这并不意味着金融崩溃已成为过去，而是市场尚未认清当前金融体系面临的真正威胁的本质。
In a recent Financial Times interview, former Goldman Sachs CEO Lloyd Blankfein stated that people have "got more complacent" about financial risks since the 2008 crisis. The article argues that while markets have withstood shocks like the US war on Iran and Russia's war against Ukraine, this does not mean financial crashes are a thing of the past. Instead, markets have likely failed to grasp the true nature of the current threats to the financial system.

The eurozone's inflation rate for February came in at 1.9%, exceeding economists' forecasts and rising by 0.2 percentage points from January. While this marks the first time inflation has been below the European Central Bank's 2% target for two consecutive months since April 2021, the unexpected rebound could prompt markets to reassess the ECB's monetary policy trajectory.

The Pentagon and the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) agreed to conduct an anti-drone 'high-energy laser test' in New Mexico over the weekend. This follows an incident a little more than a week prior where the FAA closed airspace around Fort Hancock, Texas, for 'special security reasons.' A joint statement from the Pentagon, FAA, and Customs and Border Protection (CBP) stated the Department of War shot down a 'seemingly threatening' drone in military airspace. A House committee linked the closure to the Pentagon using a 'high risk counter-unmanned aircraft system' against a CBP drone near the U.S.-Mexico border. The incident, along with another drone incursion, faced congressional criticism.

印度设定了到本世纪中叶实现100吉瓦核电装机容量的宏伟目标，但目前仅有约8吉瓦。为实现这一目标，印度需要稳定的铀燃料供应，而国内产能无法满足。为此，加拿大总理马克·卡尼与印度总理纳伦德拉·莫迪于周一在新德里会晤时，签署了一项为期10年的铀供应协议。分析师认为，这是一项旨在解决燃料约束的结构性承诺。
India aims to achieve 100 gigawatts of nuclear capacity by mid-century, but currently has only about 8GW. A reliable uranium supply, beyond domestic production, is critical to this goal. To address this constraint, a 10-year uranium supply agreement was signed on Monday in New Delhi during a meeting between Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney and Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi. Analysts view this as a structural commitment to fuel India's nuclear ambitions.

Prominent gold investor Peter Schiff tweeted that a deeply undervalued gold producer featured in his investment research has restarted a second mine. He noted that at a gold price of $4,000, the company traded at roughly 2x forward earnings, and at $5,000 gold, its P/E ratio would be "a total joke." Schiff emphasized the company's current profitability and staggering upside potential, while promoting his premium research service.

China unveiled its 14th Five-Year Plan draft at the National People's Congress, setting an annual GDP growth target of "over 6%" for 2021-2025. The plan prioritizes technological self-reliance, aiming for average annual growth of over 7% in R&D spending, with intensity higher than the 13th Five-Year Plan period. Adopted by the NPC, it addresses U.S. tech restrictions and aims for high-quality economic development.

On March 8, the U.S. Transportation Security Administration (TSA) warned via social media that travelers at major U.S. airports are facing security line delays of up to nearly 3 hours due to the ongoing federal government shutdown, resulting in missed flights and massive peak travel delays. TSA Deputy Assistant Secretary for Public Affairs Lauren Bis stated that frontline officers, having received only partial pay and now facing their first full missed paycheck, are experiencing financial hardship and absences, leading to crippling staffing shortages. She called on Democrats to fund the Department of Homeland Security (DHS).

Iran has claimed responsibility for a deadly cluster bomb attack on central Israel, calling it the 'first wave under the new Ayatollah.' Since the start of Operation Epic Fury, Israel has suffered rare mass casualty events and major urban destruction. The official death toll is eleven civilians killed and dozens wounded, with two Israeli troop deaths in southern Lebanon. The most devastating single incident was an Iranian missile strike on Beit Shemesh on March 1, killing nine people. On Monday, widespread reports indicate another significant deadly missile impact in central Israel, with local media reporting at least one killed and two seriously wounded.

According to Bloomberg, China's latest five-year plan omits a 2030 solar installation target, signaling challenges after years of rapid growth. Released during the National People's Congress, the plan shifts focus to offshore wind, nuclear, and pumped-hydro power, with solar receiving less attention. This follows a record surge where solar generation surpassed wind last year, but the expansion is straining the power system.

The core event is a rocket attack by Hezbollah on Israeli border positions on Friday, injuring at least eight Israeli soldiers, five of whom are in serious condition. Key figures include eight wounded and five seriously injured. Key entities involved are the Israeli Ministry of Finance (whose minister, Bezalel Smotrich, had his son among the wounded), the Israeli military, and Hezbollah (the "Islamic Resistance"). The attack occurred a day after Smotrich vowed to make Beirut "look like Khan Yunis," escalating regional tensions.

President Milei's ambitions to develop nuclear energy in Argentina are facing local resistance. With uranium resources totaling roughly 10,500 tonnes, energy firms are showing interest as several governments worldwide look to rapidly expand nuclear capacity. However, many Argentinians are less enthusiastic about uranium mining, particularly in Patagonia, casting uncertainty over Argentina's potential as a major mining hotspot for critical minerals like lithium, copper, and uranium.

4月16日（周二），中国外交部长王毅应以色列请求，与以外长通话，敦促以色列立即结束在伊朗的战争。此次通话发生在4月13日（上周六）以色列与美国对德黑兰发动大规模袭击、导致伊朗最高领袖哈梅内伊及其妻子和高级官员身亡之后。伊朗随后在中东地区发起的反击至今效果有限。中国明确反对任何军事打击。
On Tuesday, April 16, Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi, at Israel's request, urged his Israeli counterpart to help bring about an immediate end to the war in Iran during a call. The call came three days after Israel and the United States launched a massive attack on Tehran on Saturday, April 13, killing Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, his wife, and senior officials. Iranian counter-attacks across the Middle East have been largely ineffective to date. China opposes any military strikes.

Japan's Nikkei 225 index plummeted 5.4%, marking its largest single-day drop since the selloff triggered by tariff concerns in April. This sharp decline was highlighted in a key figure's post on Twitter/X via the official API, underscoring a severe deterioration in market sentiment. The core of the event lies in the magnitude of the drop (5.4%) and the comparison timeframe (the April tariffs selloff), suggesting the market may be confronting a new wave of significant risk aversion or systemic pressure.

Federal Reserve Governor Michelle Bowman warned on September 5, 2024, that recent oil price increases could exacerbate inflationary pressures, suggesting the Fed may need to adopt a "tighter" policy than currently anticipated. She emphasized the Fed's willingness to raise interest rates further if progress on inflation stalls or reverses. This statement reinforced market expectations for the Fed to maintain high interest rates to combat inflation.

AI 深度解读
根据预测市场Polymarket的数据，本月美国油价触及每桶90美元的几率已升至创纪录的73%。这一概率反映了市场对油价即将突破关键心理价位的强烈预期。值得注意的是，自2023年10月以来，油价尚未突破过90美元大关。此数据源自Twitter/X平台的关键人物推文，核心信息聚焦于高概率的油价上行风险与关键时间节点。
According to prediction market Polymarket, there is now a record 73% chance that US oil prices will hit $90 per barrel this month. This probability indicates a strong market expectation for prices to breach a key psychological level. Notably, oil prices have not exceeded $90 since October 2023. This information originates from a key figure's post on Twitter/X, highlighting the high-probability upside risk and the critical timeframe.

地缘与能源[@KobeissiLetter] The cost of shipping crude oil from the US to Asia is skyrocketing: It now costs over $29 million to hire a supertanker to take 2 million barrels of crude from the US Gulf Coast to China, the highest…
[@KobeissiLetter] 美国至亚洲原油运输成本飙升：租用超级油轮从美国墨西哥湾沿岸运送200万桶原油至中国的费用现超2900万美元，创历史…
Twitter/X - 关键人物推文（官方API） 2026-03-06 00:57
AI 深度解读
中东战争导致霍尔木兹海峡航运中断，迫使亚洲买家转向美国原油，引发美亚航线运费飙升。数据显示，租用超级油轮将200万桶原油从美国墨西哥湾运至中国的成本已超过2900万美元，创历史新高。运费在两周内翻倍，占当前约75美元/桶WTI原油价格的约20%，较8月的约5%增长四倍。由于成本不可持续，过去24小时内已有大量预订被取消，供应链承受历史性压力。
The ongoing war in the Middle East has effectively shut down traffic through the Strait of Hormuz, forcing Asian buyers to turn to US crude oil. This has caused shipping rates from the US Gulf Coast to Asia to skyrocket. The cost to hire a supertanker for 2 million barrels to China now exceeds $29 million, a record high. Rates have doubled in two weeks, accounting for a record ~20% of the current ~$75 WTI oil price, quadruple the ~5% level in August. Many bookings have been canceled in the last 24 hours as costs become unsustainable, putting historic stress on oil supply chains.

According to a breaking news tweet from @KobeissiLetter, the Dow Jones Industrial Average extended its losses to nearly 800 points for the day as U.S. oil prices surged to a fresh 13-month high. The core event highlights a significant negative correlation between the stock market (Dow) and the commodity market (oil). The surge in oil prices has intensified market concerns about inflation and economic growth, leading to a sharp sell-off in equities. Key figures: Dow down nearly 800 points, oil at a 13-month high.

According to a breaking news update from @KobeissiLetter, spot gold prices have extended their losses, falling below the key psychological level of $5,100 per ounce. This decline is notable as it occurs against a backdrop of elevated market uncertainty and surging oil prices. Typically, such conditions bolster demand for safe-haven assets like gold. The counterintuitive drop may indicate a strengthening market expectation that the Federal Reserve will maintain higher interest rates to combat inflation, thereby reducing the appeal of non-yielding gold.

多源确认
[@zerohedge] 参议员要求财政部单方面调整资本利得税指数化，绕过国会 https://t.co/sLU1MwxMGk
Twitter/X - 关键人物推文（官方API）, ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 (2 sources) 2026-03-04 10:20
AI 深度解读
美国参议员要求财政部单方面对资本利得进行通胀指数化调整，此举旨在绕过国会立法程序。若实施，将降低长期资产出售时的实际税负，可能刺激投资活动并影响政府税收。核心机构为美国财政部（Treasury），关键诉求是单方面行动（Unilaterally）。
U.S. Senators have requested the Treasury Department to unilaterally implement inflation indexing for capital gains, bypassing the need for Congressional approval. This move, if enacted, would reduce the effective tax burden on the sale of long-term assets by adjusting for inflation, potentially stimulating investment activity and impacting government revenue. The core institution involved is the U.S. Treasury.

AI 深度解读
根据ZeroHedge、OilPrice等来源报道，霍尔木兹海峡（Hormuz）的航运冻结事件导致布伦特（Brent）与迪拜（Dubai）原油价差扩大至多年高位。该事件直接冲击了中东原油的运输通道，引发市场对特定区域原油供应中断的担忧，从而推高了与布伦特基准挂钩的原油价格相对于迪拜原油的溢价。
According to sources including ZeroHedge and OilPrice, a shipping freeze in the Strait of Hormuz has driven the Brent-Dubai crude oil spread to a multi-year high. This event directly impacts a key Middle Eastern oil transit route, raising market concerns about supply disruptions for specific regional crudes and consequently widening the premium of Brent-linked oil prices over Dubai crude.

According to a key figure's social media post, Iran has once again claimed to have closed the Strait of Hormuz and predicts oil prices will surge to $200 per barrel, a 160% increase from current levels. If confirmed, this would immediately disrupt global crude supply and trigger market fears of an energy crisis.

According to a tweet from Kobeissi Letter on March 2nd, US oil prices have officially erased all losses incurred during the Trump Administration, rising by $23 per barrel since December. As markets price in a prolonged disruption to crude oil supplies, US gasoline prices are surging. Over the past two months, the national average gas price has increased from $2.80 to $3.11 (as of March 2nd), with expectations to exceed $3.20 the next day, marking a nearly 15% rise in two months. The key question now centers on how long the world can sustain the closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

Trump asserted the right to stop everything related to Spain and stated the US could use Spain's bases by simply flying in. This escalation signals a severe deterioration in US-Spain relations and potential bilateral trade conflict.

Federal Reserve Vice Chair for Supervision Bowman delivered a speech addressing liquidity resiliency and financial stability. As a key policymaker, her remarks reflect the Fed's assessment of the financial system's health and its policy stance. The focus on enhancing the banking system's shock-absorption capacity suggests the Fed is balancing inflation control with financial stability concerns, which could influence the pace and magnitude of future interest rate decisions.

Global stock markets posted their largest declines in months, triggered by Brent crude oil prices surging above $85 per barrel and President Trump's statement that the US can fight 'forever.' South Korea led the decline with an 8% drop, followed by Japan, South Africa, Germany, and Spain all down over 5%. The market is beginning to price in a longer period of conflict, with geopolitical risks and soaring energy costs weighing heavily on risk assets.

SCMP-中国经济 2026-02-28 14:00
AI 深度解读
上海交通大学X-LANCE实验室的研究人员发布了全球首个统一20多种阿拉伯方言的开源文本转语音（TTS）AI模型“Habibi”。此举被分析师认为将扩大中国在中东地区的技术影响力。该模型由国内顶尖的视听与语言处理研究机构之一主导开发。
Chinese researchers from Shanghai Jiao Tong University's X-LANCE Lab have released Habibi, the world's first open-source text-to-speech model that unifies over 20 Arabic dialects. Analysts view this development as a move poised to expand China's technological influence in the Middle East.

The Federal Reserve issued a consumer alert via its official social media account, warning that scammers are using phishing emails disguised as communications from the Fed. These fraudulent messages employ fake fraud alerts and other scare tactics to steal personal financial information. The post did not specify dates or figures. Its core purpose is for the key financial institution to proactively safeguard its credibility and public financial security by advising vigilance and directing to official guidance.

地缘与能源Deutsche Bank Warns Energy Shock "Existential Threat" To Airlines, May Force Some To Ground Fleets
德意志银行警告能源冲击对航空公司构成"生存威胁"，或迫使部分公司停飞机队
ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-03-09 05:30
AI 深度解读
德意志银行警告，中东地区“史诗之怒”军事行动引发的能源冲击对航空公司构成“生存威胁”，可能导致部分公司停飞机队。截至上周末，相关航班中断已超14,000架次。尽管迪拜、阿布扎比等机场周中开始恢复航班，但波斯湾地区航空枢纽仍是中断中心，已有10个国家部分或完全关闭空域。飙升的能源价格正加剧全球航空业，尤其是最脆弱航司的运营风险。
Deutsche Bank warns that the energy shock triggered by Operation Epic Fury in the Middle East poses an "existential threat" to airlines, potentially forcing some to ground fleets. Flight disruptions exceeded 14,000 by last weekend. While airports like Dubai and Abu Dhabi resumed flights mid-week, Persian Gulf hubs remain the epicenter, with ten countries partially or fully closing airspace. Surging energy prices heighten operational risks for the global aviation industry, particularly the weakest carriers.
相关标的 原油/Crude Oil航空股/Airline Stocks
利空 对航空股利空：能源价格飙升与运营中断直接推高成本、削减收入，威胁航司盈利与生存能力。

美国能源部长克里斯·赖特于周日接受CBS、CNN和福克斯新闻采访时表示，因伊朗冲突导致的油价飙升是暂时的“恐惧溢价”，而非根本性供应问题。他强调全球能源市场供应充足，尽管霍尔木兹海峡（承担全球约五分之一海运原油）的油轮运输受到干扰。赖特预测油价将在“数周内，而非数月内”回落，并将此冲突描述为“结束一场持续47年的对美战争”过程中的一次干扰。
U.S. Energy Secretary Chris Wright stated in Sunday interviews with CBS, CNN, and Fox News that the recent oil price spike due to the Iran conflict is a temporary "fear premium," not a fundamental supply issue. He emphasized that global energy markets remain well-supplied despite disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz, which carries about one-fifth of the world's seaborne crude. Wright predicted prices would fall in "weeks, not months," framing the conflict as a disruption on the path to ending "a 47-year war against America."

According to Bloomberg, Oracle Corporation and OpenAI have scrapped plans to expand a flagship AI data center campus in Abilene, Texas. Negotiations stalled over financing and OpenAI's "changing needs," widely interpreted as the project's financials no longer making sense. This marks a concrete setback in the AI investment narrative, signaling growing skepticism towards the "AI solves everything" thesis driven by massive capital expenditure.

美国政治与财政/贸易3 Reasons Why Obamacare Is So Hard To Fix
奥巴马医改如此难以修复的3个原因
ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-03-07 09:05
AI 深度解读
《平价医疗法案》（奥巴马医改）自2014年实施以来问题持续。初期网站故障频发，首年保费即上涨23%。尽管KFF民调显示自2017年起公众支持率转为正面，且2025年覆盖超2400万人，但核心问题未解：12年间保费翻倍，消费者选择有限，设计缺陷浪费税款。同时，保险公司已适应规则，2014至2024年持续盈利，年收入翻倍至1.1万亿美元。
The Affordable Care Act (Obamacare) has faced persistent issues since its 2014 launch, including initial website glitches and a 23% premium hike in its first year. While KFF polls show public favorability since 2017, with over 24 million insured by 2025, core problems remain: premiums have more than doubled over 12 years, consumer choice is limited, and design flaws waste taxpayer money. Insurers have adapted, more than doubling annual revenue to $1.1 trillion and consistently profiting from 2014 to 2024.

ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-03-07 07:50
AI 深度解读
美国总统特朗普于周四解雇了国土安全部部长Kristi Noem，并任命俄克拉荷马州参议员Markwayne Mullin接替，这是其第二任期内的首次内阁人事变动。然而，民主党人明确表示，人事变动并未改变其立场，围绕国土安全部预算的僵局仍在持续。该部门部分停摆已进入第三周，民主党坚持要求对移民和海关执法局及海关与边境保护局实施广泛限制，且立场因人事变动而更趋强硬。众议院少数党领袖Hakeem Jeffries强调需要的是政策改变，而非人事调整。
On Thursday, President Donald Trump fired Department of Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem and appointed Sen. Markwayne Mullin of Oklahoma as her replacement, marking the first administration shake-up of his second term. Democrats, however, stated this personnel change did not alter their stance. The standoff over DHS funding continues, with the partial shutdown now in its third week. Their demands for sweeping restrictions on Immigration and Customs Enforcement and Customs and Border Protection remain firm, with House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries emphasizing the need for a policy change, not just a personnel one.
